problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Resonant. Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power directly addresses this.
